Description.description: Discrete tasks / to-dos tracked by the My Work Code App. Each action item belongs to one customer (account), has a priority, a task status (Recognized -> In Progress -> Pending Comms -> On Hold -> Wrapping Up -> Complete), and a task type (Work / Personal / Learning). Drives the dashboard KPI cards and Kanban board. Use this table for anything phrased as a 'task', 'to-do', 'action', 'follow-up', 'work item', or 'next step'. Create a record to log a new task; update tdvsp_taskstatus to advance it through the workflow. Pinned action items (tdvsp_pinned = true) surface on the dashboard.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Owner Id
Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record
Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.
Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.
Status of the Action Item
Status of the Action Item
Reason for the status of the Action Item
Reason for the status of the Action Item
Unique identifier for entity instances
Lookup to the account (customer) this task is for. Every task is scoped to exactly one customer. Filter tasks by account using _tdvsp_customer_value.
Due date (or scheduled date) for the task. Used for sorting and for 'due today / this week' filters.
Long-form details of the task — context, steps, acceptance criteria, links. Displayed in the detail dialog.
Short title of the action item / task. Primary display field shown in lists, the Kanban board, and dashboard cards. Required, free text.
True when the user has pinned this action item to the dashboard so it stays visible. Defaults to false.
Priority choice. Values: 468510002 = Top Priority, 468510003 = High, 468510001 = Medium, 468510000 = Low. Drives color coding in the UI.

Workflow state of the task. Values: 468510000 = Recognized, 468510001 = In Progress, 468510002 = Pending Comms, 468510003 = On Hold, 468510004 = Wrapping Up, 468510005 = Complete. Drives the Kanban board columns and the dashboard donut chart.
Category of work. Values: 468510000 = Personal, 468510001 = Work, 468510002 = Learning. Drives the task-type pie chart and filter pills on the dashboard.
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
